title: Tool Adapter Schema V1
description: JSON Schema for Project Lumina tool adapter definitions. Tool adapters define how the orchestrator may call external tools, what inputs are acceptable, and what outputs mean.

tool_name.description: Human-readable name of the external tool

description.description: Description of what this tool does and when the orchestrator may use it

domain_id.description: ID of the domain pack that authorized this tool

call_types.description: List of call type identifiers this adapter supports

input_schema.description: JSON Schema fragment describing acceptable inputs to this tool

output_schema.description: JSON Schema fragment describing the tool output structure

who_may_call.description: Roles authorized to invoke this tool. Use 'entity' for the domain subject (student, patient, operator, etc.) — the domain's conversational_interface_overrides handle the domain-specific vocabulary.

requires_entity_consent.description: Whether explicit entity consent is required before calling this tool

max_calls_per_session.description: Maximum invocations per session, or null for unlimited

logged_in_ctl.description: Whether calls to this tool are recorded in the CTL as ToolCallRecords

on_failure.description: What the orchestrator does when the tool call fails

fallback_standing_order_id.description: Standing order to invoke on tool failure (if on_failure is fallback_to_standing_order)
